positive: A whimsical, highly stylized depiction of floating constellations and bioluminescent flora, rendered in a clean graphic novel style. The central composition features intertwined, geometric depictions of deep-sea coral and stylized astronomical rings, forming a mandala pattern. Use a limited color palette of deep sapphire blue, ethereal neon teal, burnt orange, and stark white accents. The illumination should mimic a gentle, glowing internal source, creating sharp contrasts and perfect, clean silhouettes against a slightly distressed midnight background. Central, symmetrical composition, vector graphic aesthetic, highly detailed lines, suitable for screen printing, maximalist yet clean design, symmetrical.
